## What changed

Describe the focused change and the production workflow it supports.

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] I used no real production, personal or confidential data.
- [ ] I committed no credentials or privileged Supabase keys.
- [ ] I considered SBS JSON and database backward compatibility.
- [ ] I documented any schema, permission or calculation change.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] I manually verified the affected workflow with synthetic data.

## Documentation

- [ ] I updated English and Italian user-facing documentation, or this change requires none.
